title: Principal Radiologist at Dr Lal PathLabs

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Dr Lal PathLabs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
